title: APF Paper 4 — Admissibility Constraints and Structural Saturation
description:
Full SM gauge structure, 45-fermion field content, three generations, and all mass/mixing/CP-violation parameters derived from finite enforcement capacity with zero free parameters. Includes T_M interface monogamy, T_4F three-generations, gauge template uniqueness (SU(3)*SU(2)*U(1), N_c=3), the 1-of-4680 fermion filter, capacity partition C_total=61=45+4+12, sin^2 theta_W=3/13 via gate S_0 synthesis, Schur mass chain, Cabibbo sin theta_C=e^{-3/2}, CKM + CP violation, PMNS structure, dark sector as C_ext, Lambda = capacity residual.

Version 2.0 (2026-04-19) is a full-scope rebuild from the February 2026 PDF-only release (9pp) into a 39-page main paper + 19-page Technical Supplement v1.0. Technical Supplement contains: assumption inventory (PLEC + Regime R + H1--H4 paper-specific hypotheses); formal proofs for T_M biconditional, T_4F with CP-coherence correction, 1-of-4680 two-phase derivation, sin^2 theta_W synthesis, FN ladder, PMNS; 6 countermodels; red-team on H1--H4; theorem index + ASCII dependency diagram; changelog. All theorems trace to named check functions in the bundled apf/ subset (35/35 checks pass).

creators.name: Brooke, Ethan
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, San Anselmo, California, USA
